name: academorix/attributes
purpose: Sport-agnostic attribute-set substrate — AttributeSet + AttributeDefinition + AttributeGroup aggregates for server-driven UI on discriminator-varying hosts.
capabilities: AttributeSet (asg_ prefix) — versioned set bound to entity_type + discriminator
Widget mapping (select, switch, slider, number, date, input)
when_to_use: A domain (e.g. athlete enrollment) has sport-variable fields that must be rendered from a set selected by discriminator rather than hardcoded columns.
when_not_to_use: For fixed-shape entities where all consumers need the same columns, use plain migrations and Spatie Data DTOs.
